row.runtime: PUBLIC payload usable by a proposer; no hidden info/outcome/pilot
row.eval_meta: evaluation-only; MUST NOT be a model input

traced_agent: current Starmie heuristic/search agent at the DEPLOYED baseline (sub_starmie2 behaviour): STARMIE_DISABLE=R15, ATTACH_MEGA off, continuity leaf off. Trace mode is read-only and does not change the chosen action.
join_for_model_a: runtime.option_index_to_semantic_key maps each legal option index to its semantic key; the proposer predicts semantic keys, join to legal options + compare to current_agent_action_key and (eval_meta) pilot_action_key by decision_id.

feature_marks.exact_card_specific: attach_target_role, attack key (Jetting/Nebula/Turbo), Ignition unit rule
